frontMatter.title: Starlight
frontMatter.description: A journey through the digital cosmos. My latest electronic experiment.

content:
About the Track

Starlight was composed during a late-night session while staring at the skyline. I wanted to capture the feeling of infinite possibility that comes with the quiet of the night. It features modular synths, a driving bassline, and ethereal vocal pads.

Audio Preview

Distribution Details
